race.comment: BLITZWATER (9) is overdue for a win placing all three this time in. Just missed on the turf here two back then again beaten narrowly last time at Rockhampton. First try on the poly but honest and will be tough to hold out. Stablemate KING SPIRIT (2) is also in great form including a near miss at Rockhampton last time. Has a strong record on the poly including a win at his only try here. Aided by the claim and looks a top hope. RICH MINX (3) was a close-up fifth over this distance, beaten 1.5 lengths, when resuming with a big weight. Form over this journey is strong, boasting two wins from four starts. Has a high cruising speed. Winning claims on best figures. DESIAH (8) resumed in the same race and was only beaten half a length into fourth. Fitter this time will prove harder to beat. RISE OF THE MASSES (1) goes best while fresh and is capable of a big return.
